name: mushroom-cavern
summary: A vast fungal cavern — towering shriekers, clusters of glowcaps, a spongy mycelium floor that absorbs sound.

primary_palette.note: a canopy-sized cap dominating the chamber
ring of the fungal community in silent communion
a shallow basin of luminous spore-water

story_prompts: myconid sovereign offers parlay through spore-speech
a violet fungus grove stalks anything that disturbs the shriekers
poachers harvesting glowcaps have drawn the cavern's wrath
a lost child of the surface lies dreaming in the spore-pool

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: soft dim glow (0.25-0.35) from bioluminescent fungi — cool teal/violet tint

anti_patterns: no firelight — flame kills the fungal ecosystem and breaks the mood
don't grid the mushrooms — they grow in natural clusters of 3-7
ceiling should read as high and vaulted, not low and cramped
